positive: A minimalist, stylized line art illustration depicting a soaring mountain silhouette viewed from below, contrasting against a dynamic, gradient sunset sky. The scene features geometrically simplified stylized clouds, a few majestic mountain peaks, and a stylized crescent moon. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, vibrant coral, and burnt orange. The composition should be highly centralized, creating a strong, repeatable pattern element suitable for screen printing on apparel. Vector art style, ultra-detailed, clean silhouettes, perfect for t-shirt printing, graphic novel illustration, high contrast, bright backlighting, negative space utilization.
negative: blur, grainy, text, watermark, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poor composition, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, abstract mess
